description: Send the input to the node to the list of addresses provided

tag.description: The tag that the output message should be tagged with
tag.title: Message Tag

recipient_list.description: A comma-separated list of email addresses. Supports Jinja2 templates, e.g. {{ participant_data.email }}. Use {{ participant_data.emails | join(',') }} for a list, or {{ participant_data.emails | split(';') | join(',') }} for a delimited string.
recipient_list.title: Recipient List

subject.description: Email subject. Supports Jinja2 templates, e.g. {{ participant_data.name }}
subject.title: Subject

body.description: Optional Jinja2 template for the email body. If empty, the pipeline input is used. Available variables: input, node_inputs, temp_state, session_state, participant_data, participant_details, participant_schedules, input_message_id, input_message_url.
body.title: Body

title: SendEmail
ui:label: Send an email
